reviews.review_description:
This game is one of the best games i've ever played, and heres's some ideas that I think people love. 

1: Choice in starting weapons, I feel like we should be able to chose diffrent weapons to start a run like how other loop runners have specific weapons they use, maybe even the ability to make custom weapons due to the Voxel style & System?

2: Some kinda testing room to test all the weapons & Turbo fists

3: A team mode letting you team up with over looprunners against other teams of looprunners with increased difficualty, maybe with a new final boss at the end that'd team up with the captin?

None of these are probably gonna be added, but hopefully youll consider them

You missed out on the upgrade machine and a whole bunch of stuff that should have been added to this game showing it’s truly a sequel. Bring back spears with shields and hammers, Let the dash be automatic instead of swinging arms like an idiot, allow actual armor to be added then allow the hand to be the armor backup. Bring back fire weapons and allow a laser and fire breath  while the spidertrons return. And allow to swap weapons attached to your characters upgrades you can keep as long as you won. 

Last thing I want to ask is remove every animation with those idiotic kids you had used to make of the npcs and never hire kids again looks super sloppy and stupid. I can tell you used kids to make the game and that was a horrible mistake never do that for any game the only thing they could do I voice that’s all.

reviews.review_title: This game is as good as the first one
reviews.review_description: I played the original clone drone in the danger zone and I was so excited when  I found out there was a vr game, I have had such a blast playing and finishing the game, and once you unlock the tower the game just gets more fun, I think I’ve gotten to floor 70 ish and I love every moment I spent on this game. Although I am sad that spider-tron and the upgrade bot dont return, even though upgrade bot is in the final boss fight we don’t get to use him.

I love this game with my whole heart it really brings me into the clone drone world. I pets love the game and the mechanics to it. However k do have some game ideas like a dlc into a world like the original game or even letting us customize Blink but other than that I recommend this game to everyone and think they should give it a shot.

I love the game and gives great exercises. I just wish there were boss battles like the spider bot 3000 from the pc version or a giant bosses like El Gigante from resident evil 4. And I would like to have the upgrade bot back or something close to it. And the flame sword(not the katana) I’m talking about the short sword and armor please.

Even after finishing the campaign, it still very fun to come back to with being able to mix and match turbo fists. The game could be a tad harder even with the new update. but with more updates to come this is a must buy.

The game is overall , really good with some noticeable bugs that can cause problems, but it is still playable until you get to the Skyscraper where's the bugs get much , much more noticeable and caused many more problems than usual, like during one layout, if an archer bot decides not to move from where he spawned (which is extremely common) Then he becomes completely unaccessible unless you have a bow, or if you lost an arm just is completely unaccessible meaning you'll likely lose multiple clones on one stage that would be extremely easy if not 41 extremely big flaw , which can end up ruining your entire run through of the Skyscraper and when you get such a noticeable bug back to back with for some reason , not being able to dash or Kata not becoming visible after turning invisible before attacking an entire run through can be ruined and ended for practically no reason.
I got this game thinking it wouldn’t be worth the money but i was completely wrong about that, the ai are smart and challenging to fight which i think is what makes the game fun.

Everything about this game is perfect, its big, its challenging, it's pure chaos among the entire crash loop with 8 robots fighting to the death! is it just me, or are the defend droids harder to battle than other loop runners? idk, must be because of numbers. Anyways, greatest game of all time!

Nice physics good idea great execution
Use to play clone from in the danger zone and its a great evolution
My experience of the game was good but after I beat the game I was in a loop of tower.  Please add more.
The only thing it needs is multi-player.

clone drone in the hyperdome was one of the first vr games that made me struggle fighting npcs not because you get one tapped every time you get hit on a vital spot like your head or chest. it's because the npcs are so smart the animations look like they're made by another player and it feels like you're fighting another person in vr on top of that the npcs force me to actually struggle and find out strategies to kill them overall this game is really really great PS: 
needs multiplayer
If you like a failure in life and all the NPC‘s are too good at fighting and I don’t even get to keep the abilities I get ￼

reviews.review_title: Why the game needs sandbox mode
reviews.review_description:
Clone Drone in the Hyperdome is already a fun and exciting game that many players love. The combat feels great, the mechanics are engaging, and the experience offers plenty of action. But one feature that could truly elevate the game is the addition of a sandbox mode — a space where players can freely experiment and play without structured objectives.

Here’s why adding a sandbox mode would be a big win for both players and the game:

⸻

1. It Boosts Player Creativity and Experimentation

A sandbox mode lets players explore the game’s systems without limits. Instead of following missions or progression paths, players could:
	•	Try out all weapons and tools freely.
	•	Mix and match enemies and environments.
	•	Test new strategies without penalty.

This kind of freedom encourages creative play and lets players discover new ways to enjoy the game.

⸻

2. It Increases Replay Value

After completing the main modes, some players feel like they’ve seen everything the game has to offer. A sandbox mode gives players a reason to keep coming back — it’s a space where they can set their own goals, challenge themselves, and stay engaged long after they finish other content.

⸻

3. It Encourages Community Sharing and Collaboration

Sandbox environments inspire players to share what they create and discover. Whether it’s a unique combat setup, a clever tactic, or a personal challenge, players love showing off and collaborating. This strengthens the community and keeps the conversation around the game alive.

⸻

4. It Gives Players More Control Over Their Experience

Games that offer player-driven play — where users can shape their own experiences — tend to feel more rewarding. Sandbox mode empowers players, giving them ownership over how they want to play instead of only following preset paths.

⸻

5. It Complements What the Game Already Does Well

Clone Drone has always appealed to players who enjoy experimenting — from using different weapons to mastering combat mechanics. Adding sandbox mode fits perfectly with that spirit by giving players a dedicated space to explore, learn, and play however they want.

⸻

Conclusion

Adding a sandbox mode to Clone Drone in the Hyperdome would:

✔ Give players more freedom to create their own experiences
✔ Extend replay value and long-term enjoyment
✔ Make the community more active and creative
✔ Enhance overall player satisfaction

A sandbox mode isn’t just extra content — it’s a powerful feature that would make the game even more dynamic, fun, and engaging for everyone.

reviews.review_title: Every1 saying its bad needs to get good
reviews.review_description: All the bad reviews talking about how the enemies are strong and the player is vulnerable needs to get better, the pvp can be a tad buggy but other than that it's very challenging, fun, and the slicing mechanics are extremely polished and feel right. There isn't much story, but the skyscrapper is definitely the most fun but also difficult part of the game. The game is polished and there are many types of enemies, multiple different attack patterns for EACH enemy, and every time you kill an enemy, or finish a run, it feels rewarding

reviews.review_title: forget what I said ts is peak twin
reviews.review_description: in my last version of this review I was whining about difficulty, but the game isn't really that hard. What makes the game so good is how rewarding the combat feels, plus one thing I realized is you have to USE your teleportation. Even normal enemies are on the same level as you, let alone the 3rd difficulty ones. Bosses are offensive powerhouses, and unless you've studied their attack patterns and practiced blocking in a dark warehouse for 7 hours, you have to find ways to get their shield or guard down, for example teleporting behind them. In other words; good game.

I understand that the game can be difficult at times and it might be hard to finish an entire run, but the reason what makes this game is that it is difficult. The game isnt meant to be easy, that’s not the point of them making this game

So this is my opinion and came to me in a dream but i feel like we need a mode where we have every weapon in the game (including the captian's) and we could get and replace every power (like flames and shield) and we could spawn every robot to fight them (even the bots in the lobby) because doing the tower or the hyperdome is kinda stressful with knowing how you have limited lives and you could die in a few seconds

So I have some recommendations and additions;

1. Please add another runner after you become captain and it could be like rootkris’s son or something so you could add way more lore.

2. Also another idea is you could add multiplayer or a team up with friends mode

3. Please make it so when you are captain you can go to the captains quarters whenever but you can only uncover lore after a win like usual

4. Also a final thing is you can defeat the emperor like from danger zone but you fight him with the help of literal numastar for a final battle after you uncover all lore (that’s kind of a lot and I don’t mind if you don’t add the emperor I just want him to be recognized more than just tiny statues of him in the loop)

5. Please replace the captain statues with blink statues after you become captain

Determined super-fan, UrUsualKnight

To start this is a great game, in terms of roguelike vr games this has to be my favourite and for me tops underdogs. Weapons are great and the slice feels good, realistic combat is probably the best ive seen as there are so many movements for the ai to do. This game is a great challenge as well and has you adapting to the opponent alot. 

What reviews from youtubers have said is that you can wiggle your sword and beat it easy. But i think they patched this because it does no damage now unless you actively swing

Also story funny and interesting and optional which is nice.


What I dislike
There is a bug when you grab the same weapon with both your hands, not game breaking but ive done it twice and the sword got stuck in the floor.
The other thing i dislike is the jank. It is sort of weird at times when connecting swords with the ai as everything including you will sometimes freeze when you block its not game breaking but it makes it sort of hard to parry when that happens. 
I think there needs to be a dash fist power because sometimes i will block with the sword afainst the samurai and their sword will go through mine. This makes sense because my weapon is one handed and they have the leverage but its very hard to block or get out of the way. You kind of just have to kill them before they hit you.


PS i have not fully finished the game yet but i am close so i may be missing some things this i i will update when finished

Also if you do buy the game make sure to check out the settings for a second because you can change alot of things in your playstyle with it.
.
To make the game better please add maybe one or 2 more power fists and more weapons. Also maybe add another affect apart from flame. And maybe make the weapons more rare to find because i dont see the use in choosing the weapon door when i finish the round. And add more roguelike door options and game modifiers. And make the noise when i lose an arm or a leg not as loud. And maybe make the ai make a noise or a visual effect when there is a bot off screen that is about to hit me. Some armour would also be nice or an ability to make weighted weapons less and maybe it you get hit in the arm with armour it makes the weight of that weapon super heavy. Last thing and this would probably be super hard but co-op multiplayer or vs multiplayer would be really cool.

Overall great game and probably the best roguelike in vr.

WE NEED SPIDERTRON AND MORE WEAPONS. Also, WE NEED AN ENDING TO THE GAME!! I expected something to happen after I let everyone ask Numastar a question. Maybe Blink could talk for the second time in the entire game, or we free the Todd Finkle together.

reviews.review_title: An amazing game I only just heard of!
reviews.review_description: I don't normally write reviews for games but I am having so much fun with this, how have I not heard of this before now!
The combat, the story, the graphics. They all fit together so darn well. I would buy it a million times if that's what it took to get everyone to buy it

reviews.review_title: Just beat captain, first time playing!
reviews.review_description: I’m not even joking when I say this, I beat the captain in a SINGLE BATTERY LIFE for my FIRST TIME PLAYING. And now here the part that I have to say about the game. I LOVED clone drone in the danger zone I played it continuously (and then I stopped since I got a new Nintendo switch, sorry I’m getting off track here) and I loved every second of it except for the dying parts, ow. I sadly never beat that game but it felt SO GOOD playing this game, everything from the immersion to the chaos even the parts when I died I enjoyed every second of it! It felt amazing playing this game, and the ability to teleport without cooldown is just the BEST (like this game)! Thanks you so much for making this game and when my battery gets back to full I’m going straight back in to the Hyperdome. (Ps the knight extend thing is so good, use it)

This game is pure voxel carnage with brains. The Al is surprisingly clever- dodging, flanking, and adapting like it's auditioning for a sci-fi uprising. Swordplay feels tight and satisfying, with every slash, block, and dismemberment landing like a mini victory. It's the kind of game where "just one more round" turns into an hour of robotic mayhem.

It's wildly addictive, thanks to its fast pacing and evolving challenge. But if I could change one thing? Co-op mode. Imagine teaming up to slice through waves of bots with a friend-absolute chaos, in the best way.

The combat is actually challenging compared to majority of VR games, high choice of unique weapons that are balanced, the turbo fist system can create some crazy builds, also it brings fans of the previous game to another gem and finally I have a suggestion that you add multiplayer then this game could hit the charts (also try fix the bug where your weapons get stuck in walls while teleporting) anyways keep up the good work and give me more reasons for this to be a must-buy but don't work too hard!

Honestly the worst framerate i never see in a video game in 30 year..... the game is really really fun but its not tolerable and also so easy.... the teleport is a mecanic from 2015.... and make the game almost broken.... compare to the flat version... mheeee . reviews.review_title: Game is amazing, BUT I have a bug :(
reviews.review_description:
First of all I want to say this game is great. To anyone thinking about getting it please do it is amazing. HOWEVER I (and a very small handful of people) seem to have problems with tracking after the very first update.

I played on release and it worked all fine, but since the first update, my hands seem to be locked to a grid. Slight movements do nothing, and quick movements make everything go...weird. 2 handed basically flops around, and any cool quick stuff I try ends up with my arms flipping behind the enemy or myself.

My controllers are fine, everything is up to date, I've tried all Handling modes and nothing fixes it.

Sadly I havent been able to contact the company (nor can I get a refund anymore) BUT this makes the game unplayable/incredibly unfun to play. If you notice this bug on a fresh purchase, refund while you can
Multiplayer when
This game is great going with realistic voxel destruction to a great vr roguelike, though this game would be also fun with mods if we could do it
I played this game on console, and just like SuperHot this game belongs way more on VR, it’s  fun and satisfying.

I loved the new update, and i still do. But, something in the game seems to crash after the 50th floor. 
Context: I have beaten floor 50 a good few times now. Its very harsh and unrelenting, but for some reason, my headset crashes once i pass floor 50 or higher. I have beaten up to floor 77, but my attempt was destroyed by my game crashing. I don’t know what causes it exactly, but I assume it’s due to me letting my headset charge during a large run, so it doesnt die. I have since stopped playing to give myself a rest, but I truly would march onward to try and get to floor 100… IF, there was a fix to the skyscrapper crashing crap. Otherwise? I love it. I even tried to use AI to problem-solve, but nothing works. It could just be my headset, but I want to just point it out. :)

I feel like a warrior every time I parry or dodge buuuuut I definitely would've wanted a sandbox with a level editor, just so I can recreate the Duel of the Dates but overall really really one of the greatest and most polished games that you can buy out there, I hope this helped.

i wanna see special what's on 100 floor because I'm still stuck on 72 floor.


I'll give you 5 stars to fix it.

So I used to play this game before the update, and the new update brought me back to it. I'm happy they made two handed weapons feel a bit more responsive. I can actually do a overhead slash with the katana without it veering sharply to the right for some reason. Also In a future update could we get something like a hook sword, or even just a one handed sickle, because I like trying to use the axe sometimes to hook their weapons, but it isn't really made for that to be honest. And the rapier needs some love. I want to like it but I just can't. Rapiers aren't just thrusting weapons, and most of the blade feels like it doesn't exist because I can't block with anything but the tip, or the hand guard which is not ideal when you're facing many opponents at once  and just makes the weapon feel pointless in my opinion compared to many weapons. I think extending its tips damage zone a little bit may help, and letting the rest of the blade at least be able to sort of block, so you could more easily bind, and defend yourself.

Yea, i played the first game. (the game is great! hope to see a multiplayer battle mode!) edit:found a glitch in the tutorial where if you lose a leg during the first combat master 2000 battle, the tutorial becomes unfinishable. Edit 2: for those wanting a swing=hit that's in the setting and pick tough or ultra hard
